code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let n = string.len(trimmed)
  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(trimmed, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        sum = sum + (b - 48)
      end
    when None
      sum = sum
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
end
